allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('denkihack.html','utf-8'\); const m=html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if\(m\) { m.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{ try{ new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g,''\)\); } catch\(e\){ console.error\('Syntax error in script',i+1,':', e.message\); } }\); console.log\('Parse OK'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('solarhack-v2.html','utf-8'\); const m=html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if\(m\) { m.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{ try{ new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g,''\)\); } catch\(e\){ console.error\('Syntax error in script',i+1,':', e.message\); } }\); console.log\('OK'\); }")
